metadata.title: Gaston Allende - Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Passionate Frontend developer with a touch of backend and design skills. Over 12 years of industry experience.

hero.title: Software Developer
hero.subtitle: Creating visually appealing and intuitive digital experiences with over 12 years of experience.

items.title: Frontend Expertise

items.title: Full-Stack Mindset
items.description: Backend experience with C# and .NET, bridging the gap between UI and systems to build better end-to-end solutions.

items.title: Long-Term Quality
items.description: Focused on stability and maintainability over quick fixes, especially in financial sector environments.

metadata.title: About - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Learn more about Gaston Allende, his background, experience, and education in frontend development.

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: Frontend specialist with 12+ years of experience building enterprise applications, now expanding into AI and Python

bio.title: Building for the Long Term
paragraphs: As a passionate developer, I thrive on creating visually appealing and intuitive applications with strong user experiences. With broad experience across the JavaScript ecosystem, I stay continuously up to date through courses and workshops on platforms like Udemy and Frontend Masters.
I have a keen eye for detail and build user-friendly interfaces with clean, maintainable code — something I see as the key to sustainable, long-term projects.

Today, I work in the financial sector as a fullstack developer, and I've recently started exploring AI and generative AI, learning Python and gradually building knowledge where frontend, backend, and AI intersect.

skills.title: Skills & Expertise
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with

items.title: Frontend Developer / Fullstack Developer
items.description: Developing web-based solutions focused on user experience, performance, and scalability. Building component-based interfaces with Angular and TypeScript in close collaboration with UX designers and backend developers. Driving code review processes, CI/CD, and performance measurement while contributing to architecture and technology decisions for long-term code quality. Recently expanded responsibilities to include fullstack development.

items.title: Frontend Developer (Consultant via FreeCode AB)
items.description: Refactored the codebase to achieve better architecture, scalability, maintainability, and performance. As a more senior developer, played a key role in mentoring junior developers, guiding them in best practices and helping them solve technical challenges.

items.title: Frontend Developer (Consultant via FreeCode AB)
items.description: Collaborated with scrum masters, testers, product owners, and backend developers across five teams, two located abroad. During the last 1.5 years, took on the role of frontend lead, managing a team of three frontend developers building a web application to control and configure water pump stations in Sweden and other countries. Worked closely with a UX designer to establish design rules and patterns. As the project's first frontend developer, contributed to key architectural and design decisions.

items.title: System Developer
items.description: Started as a trainee, gaining a solid foundation in IBM's technology stack. Worked with DB2, CL scripting, and RPG/LE to develop and maintain high-quality software solutions in production environments.

items.title: Frontend Developer
items.description: Developed websites, campaign pages, and integrations for various clients using JavaScript, CSS/SASS, and modern frameworks like Angular and Vue.js. Worked closely with clients to ensure deliverables met both technical and business requirements.

items.title: Web Developer (Internship, Summer Job & Freelance)
items.description: Built technical foundation through internships and freelance projects. At Situs Media AB, developed modules and custom CMS solutions in Snowfire — offered continued employment after the internship. At Klirr reklambyrå AB (Nozy), worked on an event system and the 'Challenge Ebola' campaign page supporting Doctors Without Borders and the Red Cross. As a freelancer, independently handled design and development of complete web projects using Laravel and Vue.js.

items.degree: Prompt Engineering and Generative AI for Developers

metadata.title: Projects - Gaston Allende
metadata.description: Explore the projects built by Gaston Allende — from web apps to design systems.

header.title: Featured Projects
header.subtitle: A collection of my recent work spanning web development, mobile apps, and innovative digital solutions

items.title: E-Commerce Platform
items.description: A modern e-commerce solution with real-time inventory
items.fullDescription: Built a comprehensive e-commerce platform featuring real-time inventory management, secure payment processing, and an intuitive admin dashboard. The platform handles thousands of transactions daily with 99.9% uptime.

items.title: Design System
items.description: Comprehensive design system for enterprise applications
items.fullDescription: Created a scalable design system used across multiple products, featuring 100+ components, comprehensive documentation, and accessibility guidelines. Reduced design-to-development time by 40%.

items.title: Analytics Dashboard
items.fullDescription: Built an advanced analytics dashboard processing millions of data points in real-time. Features customizable widgets, automated reporting, and predictive analytics powered by modern algorithms.

items.title: Social Platform
items.fullDescription: Launched a social media platform with innovative features including AI-powered content recommendations, live streaming, and advanced privacy controls. Scaled to support 50,000+ concurrent users.

items.title: Mobile Banking App
items.description: Secure mobile banking with biometric authentication
items.fullDescription: Developed a feature-rich mobile banking application with advanced security features including biometric authentication, encrypted transactions, and real-time fraud detection.

items.title: Component Library
items.description: Reusable React component library with full TypeScript support
items.fullDescription: Developed and published an open-source React component library with full TypeScript support, comprehensive documentation, and a Storybook playground. Used by multiple teams across different projects.

info.description: Whether you have a question, want to start a project, or simply want to connect, feel free to reach out. I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and ideas.
